## Destination Research Request
<!-- Request a new destination to be researched for the bug-free community -->

**Destination you'd like researched:**

**Country/Region:**

**Why are you interested in this destination?**
<!-- Personal plans, travel dream, community need -->

**Any known concerns about bugs?**
<!-- Have you seen reports of mosquitoes, sandflies, spiders, etc.? -->

**Your sensitivity level (optional):**
<!-- Mild aversion vs. severe phobia — helps us calibrate our bug score -->

**Preferred travel style:**
<!-- Budget / Mid-range / Luxury / Adventure / Beach / City / Hiking -->

**Any specific months you'd like us to analyze?**

---

We'll research this destination thoroughly with at least 2 independent sources, apply our [submission template](guides/submission-template.md), and publish a detailed guide with bug safety scores and seasonal data!
